underlying_goal: Onboard Claude into the SkogAI project by teaching it about @-linking in CLAUDE.md files, context budget constraints, and how to build an efficient session boot graph for future sessions
friction_detail: Session was continued from a previous conversation that ran out of context, requiring a catchup phase.
brief_summary: User onboarded Claude into the SkogAI project's philosophy of minimal-context session bootstrapping via @-linking networks, and Claude demonstrated strong understanding of the concept and its token-budget implications.
